caption: In a dimly lit outdoor setting at night, a woman with blonde hair is seated against a stone wall. She wears a black top with shimmering details and a patterned jacket draped over her shoulders. Behind her, a man with dark hair and a beard is visible, wearing a dark garment. To the right, another person is partially visible, wearing a dark outfit with a white sleeve. Warm, glowing lights are scattered in the background. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains seated and smiles, while the man behind her keeps his position. A hand enters the frame from the left, moving closer toward the woman, with its fingers slightly curled. The scene remains mostly static, with the only significant movement being the gradual approach of the hand from the left side of the frame.
